interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the airports located in the Czech Republic?
interactions.intention: Can you tell me the airports located in the Czech Republic?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME = 'Czech Republic';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these airports?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airports located in the Czech Republic?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_AIRPORT.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME = 'Czech Republic';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which cities are these airports located in?
interactions.intention: Which cities are the airports located in the Czech Republic?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_AIRPORT.NAME, MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AS CITY_NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE JOIN MONDIAL_CITY ON MONDIAL_AIRPORT.CITY = MONDIAL_CITY.NAME AND MONDIAL_AIRPORT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME = 'Czech Republic';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which airports are located in the Czech Republic?
interactions.intention: Which airports are located in the Czech Republic?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = (SELECT CODE FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY WHERE NAME = 'Czech Republic')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these airports?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airports located in the Czech Republic?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = (SELECT CODE FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY WHERE NAME = 'Czech Republic')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is the GMT offset for these airports?
interactions.intention: What is the GMT offset for the airports located in the Czech Republic?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, GMTOFFSET FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = (SELECT CODE FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRY WHERE NAME = 'Czech Republic')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries border Albania?
interactions.intention: Which countries border Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of these neighboring countries in the year 2002?
interactions.intention: What is the population of the countries bordering Albania in the year 2002?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C.COUNTRY, C.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS C JOIN MONDIAL_BORDERS B ON C.COUNTRY = B.COUNTRY2 WHERE B.COUNTRY1 = 'AL' AND C.YEAR = 2002

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the total border length of Albania with these countries?
interactions.intention: What is the total border length of Albania with its neighboring countries?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(LENGTH) AS TOTAL_BORDER_LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of cities in the Moskovskaya province?
interactions.intention: What is the population of cities in the Moskovskaya province?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these cities?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of cities in the Moskovskaya province?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Do these cities have other names?
interactions.intention: Do cities in the Moskovskaya province have other names?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME ON MONDIAL_CITY.NAME = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continents have an area greater than 10 million square kilometers?
interactions.intention: Which continents have an area greater than 10 million square kilometers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE AREA > 10000000;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of the countries in these continents?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of the countries located in the continents retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY, ME.GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME2 ON ME.COUNTRY = ME2.COUNTRY WHERE ME2.CONTINENT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE AREA > 10000000);

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the unemployment rate in those countries?
interactions.intention: What is the unemployment rate in the countries located in the continents retrieved earlier?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY, ME.UNEMPLOYMENT FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME2 ON ME.COUNTRY = ME2.COUNTRY WHERE ME2.CONTINENT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE AREA > 10000000);

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the deserts with an area larger than 100,000 square kilometers?
interactions.intention: Which deserts have an area larger than 100,000 square kilometers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces are these deserts located in?
interactions.intention: Which provinces are the deserts retrieved in the previous interaction located in?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT INNER JOIN MONDIAL_DESERT ON MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT = MONDIAL_DESERT.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_DESERT.AREA > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the alternative names for these provinces?
interactions.intention: What are the alternative names for the provinces retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT ON MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT.DESERT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 100000)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through the province of Sachsen-Anhalt?
interactions.intention: Which rivers flow through the province of Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the countries of these rivers?
interactions.intention: Can you tell me the countries of the rivers flowing through Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the sources of these rivers?
interactions.intention: What are the sources of the rivers flowing through Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY ON MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all islands in Scotland?
interactions.intention: Can you list all islands in Scotland?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND WHERE PROVINCE = 'Scotland'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of Skye island?
interactions.intention: What is the area of Skye island?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AREA FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND WHERE NAME = 'Skye'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of Skye island?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of Skye island?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND WHERE NAME = 'Skye'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the islands that have mountains?
interactions.intention: Can you list all the islands that have mountains?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of these islands?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the islands that have mountains?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME, MONDIAL_ISLAND.AREA FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND INNER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which countries are these islands located in?
interactions.intention: Which countries are the islands that have mountains located in?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME, MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND INNER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND INNER JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATEDON ON MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME = MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND;

interactions.intention: What seas are connected to the Andaman Sea?

interactions.intention: What is the area of the seas connected to the Andaman Sea?

interactions.intention: Are there any cities located along the rivers flowing through the province of Aargau?

interactions.intention: Do the rivers that flow into the North Sea pass through any lakes?

interactions.intention: Which islands are the mountains located on and what is the area of these islands?

interactions.utterance: What are the organizations established in 1945?
interactions.intention: What are the organizations established in 1945?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are members of these organizations?
interactions.intention: Which countries are members of the organizations established in 1945?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION WHERE MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ESTABLISHED = DATE '1945-11-15'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What type of membership do these countries have?
interactions.intention: What type of membership do the countries have in the organizations established in 1945?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.TYPE FROM MONDIAL_ISMEMBER JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION ON MONDIAL_ISMEMBER.ORGANIZATION = MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ABBREVIATION WHERE MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION.ESTABLISHED = DATE '1945-11-15'

interactions.utterance: What is the population growth of these countries?
interactions.intention: What is the population growth of the countries that gained independence from the Ottoman Empire?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP.COUNTRY, MP.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_POPULATION MP INNER JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MPOL ON MP.COUNTRY = MPOL.COUNTRY WHERE MPOL.WASDEPENDENT = 'Ottoman Empire';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what are the forms of government in these countries?
interactions.intention: What are the forms of government in the countries that gained independence from the Ottoman Empire?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, GOVERNMENT FROM MONDIAL_POLITICS WHERE WASDEPENDENT = 'Ottoman Empire';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas are connected to the Andaman Sea?
interactions.intention: Which seas are connected to the Andaman Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH WHERE SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of these seas?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the seas connected to the Andaman Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MS.NAME, MS.AREA FROM MONDIAL_SEA MS JOIN MONDIAL_MERGESWITH MM ON MS.NAME = MM.SEA2 WHERE MM.SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of them has the greatest depth?
interactions.intention: Which of the seas connected to the Andaman Sea has the greatest depth?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MS.NAME, MS.DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_SEA MS JOIN MONDIAL_MERGESWITH MM ON MS.NAME = MM.SEA2 WHERE MM.SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea' ORDER BY MS.DEPTH DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of the islands in Scotland?
interactions.intention: What are the names of the islands in Scotland?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND WHERE PROVINCE = 'Scotland';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country are these islands part of?
interactions.intention: Which country are the islands in Scotland part of?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND WHERE PROVINCE = 'Scotland';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many provinces does this country have?
interactions.intention: How many provinces does the country that the islands in Scotland belong to have?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE COUNTRY = (SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND WHERE PROVINCE = 'Scotland');

interactions.intention: Which countries have an unemployment rate above 20%?

interactions.utterance: What is the population growth rate in those countries?
interactions.intention: What is the population growth rate in the countries with an unemployment rate above 20%?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_POPULATION.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_POPULATION INNER JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ON MONDIAL_POPULATION.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ECONOMY.UNEMPLOYMENT > 20

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What ethnic groups are present in these countries?
interactions.intention: What ethnic groups are present in the countries with an unemployment rate above 20%?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.NAME, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP INNER JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ECONOMY.UNEMPLOYMENT > 20

interactions.intention: Which countries gained independence from the Ottoman Empire?

interactions.intention: What type of government do the countries that gained independence from the Ottoman Empire have?

interactions.intention: Which religions are present in the countries that gained independence from the Ottoman Empire?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MR.COUNTRY, MR.NAME FROM MONDIAL_RELIGION MR JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON MR.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY WHERE MP.WASDEPENDENT = 'Ottoman Empire'

interactions.intention: Which provinces in Denmark have a population greater than one million?

interactions.intention: What is the area of the provinces in Denmark with a population greater than one million?

interactions.intention: What are the capitals of the provinces in Denmark with a population greater than one million?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries in Europe have the highest GDP?
interactions.intention: Which countries in Europe have the highest GDP?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe' ORDER BY MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the unemployment rates in these countries?
interactions.intention: What are the unemployment rates in the countries in Europe with the highest GDP?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ECONOMY.UNEMPLOYMENT FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe' ORDER BY MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Also, what are the main ethnic groups in these countries?
interactions.intention: What are the main ethnic groups in the countries in Europe with the highest GDP?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.NAME, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe' ORDER BY MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP DESC

interactions.intention: Which airports are located in Karlovy Vary?

interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airports located in Karlovy Vary?

interactions.intention: What are the latitude and longitude of the airports located in Karlovy Vary?

interactions.intention: What is the population of Ulm?

interactions.utterance: Which province is Ulm located in?
interactions.intention: Which province is Ulm located in?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are located in Europe?
interactions.intention: Which countries are located in Europe?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of these countries?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of the countries located in Europe?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.COUNTRY, ME.GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME2 ON ME.COUNTRY = ME2.COUNTRY WHERE ME2.CONTINENT = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of these countries in 2012?
interactions.intention: What is the population of the countries located in Europe in 2012?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MCP.COUNTRY, MCP.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS MCP JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME ON MCP.COUNTRY = ME.COUNTRY WHERE ME.CONTINENT = 'Europe' AND MCP.YEAR = 2012

interactions.intention: Which deserts have an area larger than 1000000 square kilometers?

interactions.utterance: In which country can I find these deserts?
interactions.intention: In which country can I find the deserts retrieved in the previous interaction?

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.intention: What languages are spoken in the countries retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE WHERE COUNTRY IN (SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE DESERT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 1000000))

interactions.intention: Which mountains have an elevation greater than 1500 meters?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries share a border with Albania?
interactions.intention: Which countries share a border with Albania?

interactions.intention: What is the infant mortality rate in the countries that share a border with Albania?

interactions.intention: What is the population growth rate in the countries that share a border with Albania?

interactions.intention: Which rivers flow into the North Sea?

interactions.utterance: What is the length of these rivers?
interactions.intention: What is the length of the rivers flowing into the North Sea?

interactions.intention: What are the source elevations of the rivers flowing into the North Sea?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of countries in Europe in 2012?
interactions.intention: What is the population of countries in Europe in 2012?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe' AND MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.YEAR = 2012

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What languages are spoken in these countries?
interactions.intention: What languages are spoken in the countries of Europe?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.NAME FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the percentage of the largest language in each country?
interactions.intention: What is the percentage of the largest spoken language in each country of Europe?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.NAME, MAX(MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.PERCENTAGE) AS MAX_PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe' GROUP BY MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_LANGUAGE.NAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which lakes are located in the Xinjiang province?
interactions.intention: Which lakes are located in the Xinjiang province?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the provinces of the countries where these lakes are located?
interactions.intention: What are the provinces of the countries where the lakes retrieved in the previous interaction are located?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE LAKE IN (SELECT LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang');

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the area of the lakes in those provinces?
interactions.intention: Can you also tell me the area of the lakes in the provinces retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME, MONDIAL_LAKE.AREA FROM MONDIAL_LAKE INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE ON MONDIAL_LAKE.NAME = MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.LAKE WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE.PROVINCE IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE LAKE IN (SELECT LAKE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE WHERE PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang'));

interactions.utterance: Which organizations were established before 1950?
interactions.intention: Which organizations were established before 1950?

interactions.intention: In which country is UNESCO located?

interactions.utterance: What is the population of that country?
interactions.intention: What is the population of the country where UNESCO is located?

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.intention: What is the population of countries in the most recent year available?

interactions.intention: Which islands are part of the countries mentioned in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND, MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND INNER JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS ON MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the cities located on these islands?
interactions.intention: What are the cities located on the islands mentioned in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.CITY, MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_LOCATEDON INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND WHERE MONDIAL_LOCATEDON.ISLAND IN (SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND INNER JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS ON MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS))

interactions.intention: What is the area of the Sea of Japan?

interactions.intention: What is the maximum depth of the Sea of Japan?
